caption: A man with a grey mohawk wig, glasses, and a goatee is seated in a studio, speaking into a professional black microphone. He wears a white button-down shirt, a patterned tie, and gold suspenders, with black headphones over his ears. In the background, a woman with bright pink hair and a green top is partially visible. The room contains a framed picture of a yellow shield logo and a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS". On-screen, a logo featuring a red symbol and the text "#REALTALK PODCAST" appears on the left, while the text "REAL TALK 101" is displayed in red on the right. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he talks, while the background and surrounding equipment remain static.
